subcodes.first_line: This is the Book unto her whose soul hath shone forth upon all worlds. This is a remembrance unto her who hath sought My shelter, for verily it hath been sent down unto her [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لمن الی نفسی المشرقه علی العالمین هذا ذکر لمن لاذنی انه قد نزل لها
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
